mainEntity.name: How much does move out cleaning cost in Las Vegas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most one-bedroom apartments run $250 to $400. Three-bedroom homes typically run $400 to $700. Larger or heavily soiled spaces are quoted on walkthrough. Get a written quote in advance so there are no surprises.

mainEntity.name: Will your cleaning meet my landlord's checklist?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Send us your landlord's or property manager's move-out checklist when you book and we'll work straight from it. If anything is missed when they inspect, we come back and fix it free.

mainEntity.name: Can I book move out cleaning the day I'm moving?

acceptedAnswer.text: We recommend booking 3 to 7 days out, but we keep some same-week capacity open for last-minute moves. Call or text 702-551-4878 if you need us this week.

mainEntity.name: Do you bring your own supplies?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — all equipment, vacuums, and cleaning products. You don't need to leave anything behind.

mainEntity.name: Do you clean inside the oven and fridge?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, both are included in every move cleaning by default. Some companies charge extra for these — we don't.
